TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Qwarux, title = Qwarux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qwarux} }

S.FORM: = Qwarux = Mesa ka kari rudan alang, egu riyung oda na ka qwarux nii ma, dooyun riyung ita Seediq. Cbeyo han we, mosa neepah ka rseno ma, ani naq mosa lmiqu, mmeeyah alang de moda mangal qwarux. Migin qwarux hmneru so cbuwan hido, ini angal mneniq qeting, ado mgipuh ka hmneru qeting ma, ini eniq dooyun. Dehuk alang de bcbacun daha han ma, phdagun daha ngerac sapah daha. Mdengu du ge doosun ka quti na han, kika blequn dmaus dungan ka benac qwarux, qtaun mptinun so qyqeya maanu ma, pndngusun naq ttinun ka benac dnoosan. Kana ooda nii we daun daha mnsenge tikuh pneeyah neepah, uxe duri we daun daha qmuyux meniq sapah, mdrumuc riyung ka rudan ta cbeyo. Egu ba ooda na ka qwarux nii, slmeun bruru, wahu bruru, rawa qcurux, bunuh; stqari ddooyan hlmadac, puyan, snbragan; ngalan snuyuk bbekuy phuyu sapah, smmalu behing, tibu babuy ma kadu rodux, kana dnii. Yaani gaga rhuqan smneeru ka duma dungan.
S.PHON: = qwa…ĺux = m…ôsa ka ka…ĺi …ĺudan alaŇč, …ôgu …ĺijuŇč oda na ka qwa…ĺux nii ma, doojun …ĺijuŇč ita s…ô…ôdiq. ¶b…ôo ńßan w…ô, mosa n…ô…ôpańß ka …ĺs…ôno ma, ani naq mosa lmiqu, mm…ô…ôańß alaŇč d…ô moda maŇčal qwa…ĺux. migin qwa…ĺux ńßmn…ô…ĺu so ¶buwan ńßido, ini aŇčal mn…ôniq q…ôtiŇč, ado mgipuńß ka ńßmn…ô…ĺu q…ôtiŇč ma, ini …ôniq doojun. d…ôńßuk alaŇč d…ô b ¶ba ¶un dańßa ńßan ma, pńßdagun dańßa Ňč…ô…ĺa ¶ sapańß dańßa. md…ôŇču du g…ô doosun ka quti na ńßan, kika bl…ôqun dmaus duŇčan ka b…ôna ¶ qwa…ĺux, qtaun mptinun so qjq…ôa maanu ma, pndŇčusun naq ttinun ka b…ôna ¶ dnoosan. kana ooda nii w…ô daun dańßa mns…ôŇč…ô tikuńß pn…ô…ôańß n…ô…ôpańß, ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô daun dańßa qmujux m…ôniq sapańß, md…ĺumu ¶ …ĺijuŇč ka …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo. …ôgu ba ooda na ka qwa…ĺux nii, slm…ôun b…ĺu…ĺu, wańßu b…ĺu…ĺu, …ĺawa q ¶u…ĺux, bunuńß; stqa…ĺi ddoojan ńßlmada ¶, pujan, snb…ĺagan; Ňčalan snujuk bb…ôkuj pńßuju sapańß, smmalu b…ôńßiŇč, tibu babuj ma kadu …ĺodux, kana dnii. jaani gaga …ĺńßuqan smn…ô…ô…ĺu ka duma duŇčan.
S.FORM: = Qwarux = Mesa ka kari rudan alang, egu riyung oda na ka qwarux nii ma, dooyun riyung ita Seediq. Cbeyo han we, mosa neepah ka rseno ma, ani naq mosa lmiqu, mmeeyah alang de moda mangal qwarux. Migin qwarux hmneru so cbuwan hido, ini angal mneniq qeting, ado mgipuh ka hmneru qeting ma, ini eniq dooyun. Dehuk alang de bcbacun daha han ma, phdagun daha ngerac sapah daha. Mdengu du ge doosun ka quti na han, kika blequn dmaus dungan ka benac qwarux, qtaun mptinun so qyqeya maanu ma, pndngusun naq ttinun ka benac dnoosan. Kana ooda nii we daun daha mnsenge tikuh pneeyah neepah, uxe duri we daun daha qmuyux meniq sapah, mdrumuc riyung ka rudan ta cbeyo. Egu ba ooda na ka qwarux nii, slmeun bruru, wahu bruru, rawa qcurux, bunuh; stqari ddooyan hlmadac, puyan, snbragan; ngalan snuyuk bbekuy phuyu sapah, smmalu behing, tibu babuy ma kadu rodux, kana dnii. Yaani gaga rhuqan smneeru ka duma dungan.
S.PHON: = qwa…ĺux = m…ôsa ka ka…ĺi …ĺudan alaŇč, …ôgu …ĺijuŇč oda na ka qwa…ĺux nii ma, doojun …ĺijuŇč ita s…ô…ôdiq. ¶b…ôo ńßan w…ô, mosa n…ô…ôpańß ka …ĺs…ôno ma, ani naq mosa lmiqu, mm…ô…ôańß alaŇč d…ô moda maŇčal qwa…ĺux. migin qwa…ĺux ńßmn…ô…ĺu so ¶buwan ńßido, ini aŇčal mn…ôniq q…ôtiŇč, ado mgipuńß ka ńßmn…ô…ĺu q…ôtiŇč ma, ini …ôniq doojun. d…ôńßuk alaŇč d…ô b ¶ba ¶un dańßa ńßan ma, pńßdagun dańßa Ňč…ô…ĺa ¶ sapańß dańßa. md…ôŇču du g…ô doosun ka quti na ńßan, kika bl…ôqun dmaus duŇčan ka b…ôna ¶ qwa…ĺux, qtaun mptinun so qjq…ôa maanu ma, pndŇčusun naq ttinun ka b…ôna ¶ dnoosan. kana ooda nii w…ô daun dańßa mns…ôŇč…ô tikuńß pn…ô…ôańß n…ô…ôpańß, ux…ô du…ĺi w…ô daun dańßa qmujux m…ôniq sapańß, md…ĺumu ¶ …ĺijuŇč ka …ĺudan ta ¶b…ôo. …ôgu ba ooda na ka qwa…ĺux nii, slm…ôun b…ĺu…ĺu, wańßu b…ĺu…ĺu, …ĺawa q ¶u…ĺux, bunuńß; stqa…ĺi ddoojan ńßlmada ¶, pujan, snb…ĺagan; Ňčalan snujuk bb…ôkuj pńßuju sapańß, smmalu b…ôńßiŇč, tibu babuj ma kadu …ĺodux, kana dnii. jaani gaga …ĺńßuqan smn…ô…ô…ĺu ka duma duŇčan.
